system_components.name: User Service
system_components.responsibility: Handles user registration, authentication and profile management.

system_components.name: Habit Service
system_components.responsibility: Enables users to add, edit, delete, and track daily habits.

system_components.name: Analytics Service
system_components.responsibility: Generates analytics on habit completion rates.

system_components.name: Redis Cache
system_components.responsibility: Caches frequently accessed user data for performance.

system_components.name: RabbitMQ
system_components.responsibility: Manages asynchronous event-driven communication between services.

output.recommended: Node.js with Express for backend, React for frontend, and PostgreSQL for database.
output.decision_rationale: The microservices architecture supports building independently scalable services, which aligns well with the need for supporting high concurrency and modular development. Express is chosen for its maturity and ecosystem support in Node.js. React is recommended for highly interactive and dynamic front-end development, and PostgreSQL is chosen due to its ACID compliance and robustness in handling structured data.
